popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  from Ancestral Roots of Certain American Colonists Who Came to America before 1700, 8th Edition, 189:2, 234A:29

Hawise Malet married Sir Robert de Muscegros, and was the daughter of Sir William …

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Robert de Muscegros, Knight, was the son and heir of Richard de Muscegros.

Robert married first _____, with whom he had a son:

1.) Richard

He married second Hawise Malet, elder daughter and co-heiress of William Malet, Magna Carta surety baron. They had one son John, and two daughters.

1.) Sir John

2.) Mabel, wife of Robert de Lisle

3.) daughter, wife of Geoffrey de Amberley

He fought in Gascony in 1242.

In 1248 the king granted him the cantred of Tradree in country Clare in Ireland, he being allowed to fortify a castle there and also to have a market. He subsequently built the first castle at Banratty, county Clare. In 1252 he was granted the manor of Stowell, Somerset by his step-son, Nicholas Poyntz.

He died shortly before Jan 29, 1253/4. His widow Hawise was living 4 May 1287.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight於1207年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾迪爾爾斯特時，他的父親Richard de Mucegros25歲，母親Alice Dives18歲。他於1220年2月4日與Hawise Malet在英國薩默塞特加里 馬利特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1253年2月23日之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight was born in 1207, in Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Richard de Mucegros, was 25 and his mother, Alice Dives, was 18. He married Hawise Malet on 4 February 1220, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 23 February 1253, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight est né en 1207, à Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Mucegros, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Dives, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Hawise Malet le 4 février 1220, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 23 février 1253, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Februar 1220 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England Hawise Malet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 23. Februar 1253 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Hawise Malet il 4 febbraio 1220, nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 23 febbraio 1253, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight(이)가 1207년 영국 그루스스터실르 디후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Mucegros(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Dives(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1220년 2월 4일 영국 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 Hawise Malet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1253년 2월 23일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight nasceu em 1207, em Deerhurst, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Mucegros, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Dives, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise Malet em 4 de fevereiro de 1220, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 23 de fevereiro de 1253, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Mucegros, Knight родился в 1207 г. в местности дирурст, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Mucegros было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Dives, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise Malet 4 февраля 1220 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 23 февраль 1253 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Hawise Malet el 4 de febrero de 1220, en Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 23 de febrero de 1253, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
